overview.summary: The video records a Google Meet session (room code ede-hxjp-uod) in which participant 'Gari Zeldich' screen-shares the trackbox application — an affiliate/performance marketing CRM and lead management platform with a dark-mode enterprise UI. The application features a left-icon sidebar with sections for Dashboard, Leads, Statistics, Falcon (FTD tracking), Replace Params, Distribution, System Settings, Employees, and more. The demo focuses heavily on the Leads section (browsing, filtering, viewing individual lead details with fraud scoring and API integration data) and the Statistics section (performance analytics with customizable columns and per-affiliate insights charts). Other sections briefly shown include Security (2FA compliance tracking), Distribution (lead routing rules), Falcon (FTD records), System Settings (branding and configuration), and Employees. The UI is polished and enterprise-grade with consistent dark theming, orange/blue accent colors, and data-dense tables throughout.
